judge_result.short_rationale: The answer correctly says to remove contaminated clothing and rinse/wash the skin, but it misses the required immediate action to call a doctor or poison control center right away. It instead delays escalation to only if irritation persists. It also adds unsupported advice about neutralizing agents/scrubbing. Clear and usable, but not fully source-faithful.
